creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After a recently performed update of CURRENT r300830 to somewhat CURRENT r300990 or higher, the MSI GTX960 4G GPUs we use in some workstations start blowing full-speed-fan as soon as xdm/Xorg-server starts and throttle when shutting down the Xorg server (X11 is from most recent ports and up to date).

This phenomenon is present with the supported nVidia BLOB in ports x11/nvidia-driver as well as with the most recent BLOB 367.18 (for a patched Makefile please consult PR 201340 at https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=201340).

Below you'll find a sysctl-output regarding the OIDs of the driver exposed to the user if it is of any help.

sysctl -a|grep nvidia
